title: Fatty Midnight Venezuelan Gooey Bake
description: A rich and indulgent dessert featuring red onions, ferment-jang, and a crispy, golden crust. Perfect for midnight cravings.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, melted butter, shredded cheese, evaporated milk, and vanilla extract.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Gently fold in chopped cilantro and sour cream, if using.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
